title: Henry Schein to Present at Nasdaq's 49th Investor Conference
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world's largest provider of health care solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, announced today that the Company will present at Nasdaq's 49th Investor Conference on Wednesday, December 6, 2023, at 10:00 a.m. GMT at The May Fair Hotel in London. Henry Schein's presentations can be heard via live webcast by visiting https://investor.henryschein.com/webcasts. Replays will be available on the Henry Schein w.

title: Henry Schein Announces Receipt of Deficiency Notice From Nasdaq Regarding Requirement to Timely File Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Henry Schein announces receipt of deficiency notice from Nasdaq regarding requirement to timely quarterly report on Form 10-Q.

title: Henry Schein (HSIC) Q3 Revenues Miss, 2023 Guidance Cut
text: Henry Schein's (HSIC) third-quarter 2023 performance demonstrates remarkable sales growth in the Technology and Value-Added Service businesses.

title: Henry Schein, Inc. (HSIC) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 13, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Graham Stanley - VP of IR & Strategic Finance Project Officer Stanley Bergman - Chairman & CEO Ron South - CFO Conference Call Participants Jon Block - Stifel Elizabeth Anderson - Evercore ISI Jeff Johnson - Robert W. Baird John Stansel - JPMorgan Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler Nathan Rich - Goldman Sachs Kevin Caliendo - UBS Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to Henry Schein's Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Compared to Estimates, Henry Schein (HSIC) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Henry Schein (HSIC) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Henry Schein (HSIC) Matches Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Henry Schein (HSIC) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.32 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $1.15 per share a year ago.

title: Henry Schein's stock falls after revenue miss and lowered guidance
text: Henry Schein Inc.'s stock HSIC, +3.07% fell 1.5% in premarket trade Monday, after the provider of dental and medical supplies missed sales estimates for the third quarter and lowered its full-year guidance to reflect a slowing economy. Melville, N.Y.

title: Henry Schein Reports Third-Quarter 2023 Financial Results and Updates Full-Year Guidance
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Henry Schein reports third-quarter 2023 financial results and updates full-year guidance.

title: Insights Into Henry Schein (HSIC) Q3: Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
text: Looking beyond Wall Street's top -and-bottom-line estimate forecasts for Henry Schein (HSIC), delve into some of its key metrics to gain a deeper insight into the company's potential performance for the quarter ended September 2023.

title: Henry Schein to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences in November 2023
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world's largest provider of health care solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, announced today that the Company will present at the following investor conferences: Stifel's Healthcare Conference in New York on November 15, 2023, at 11:30 a.m. Eastern time. Piper Sandler Conference in New York on November 28, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern time. Evercore ISI HealthCONx Conference in Miami on November 29, 202.

title: Henry Schein to Webcast Third Quarter 2023 Conference Call and Provide an Update on Its Full-Year 2023 Guidance on Monday, November 13, 2023 at 10:00 a.m. ET
text: MELVILLE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Henry Schein to webcast third quarter 2023 conference call and provide an update on its full-year 2023 guidance on November 13, 2023.
